overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player walks along neon-lit streets past digital billboards, interacts with a street vendor area, moves through a covered purple-lit walkway, and crosses under an overpass. The scene features dense futuristic urban architecture with towering advertisements and cyberpunk aesthetics.

tall street light with illuminated fixture
concrete sidewalk with blue accent lines
asphalt road with moving vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking along a Night City sidewalk at night. Tall buildings covered in bright digital billboards line the left side while the street runs alongside. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions and occasional vehicles pass on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: street vendor area with illuminated food cart

events.description: approaching street vendor with red neon-lit cart on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past a street vendor cart where a person with blue hair is examining goods

vendor attending the red illuminated food cart

entered.detail: red illuminated street vendor cart with neon lighting and merchandise display
futuristic luxury vehicle parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes a street vendor's red neon-lit cart on the right sidewalk. A person with distinctive blue hair examines the vendor's goods. A parked luxury car is visible further along the curb, and the tall digital billboards remain prominent on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with vending machines and parked vehicles

events.description: approaching the entrance to a covered walkway with purple lighting visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past purple vending machines and parked cars

entered.detail: purple illuminated vending machine with digital interface

segments.scene_description: Moving past the vendor area, the camera walks along the sidewalk passing a purple vending machine on the right and approaching a covered walkway entrance. The parked luxury car becomes more prominent on the right as the camera draws closer to the purple-lit corridor ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with purple neon ceiling lighting

events.description: entering covered walkway with intense purple neon overhead lighting
exiting the purple-lit covered area back to the open street

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered corridor illuminated by bright purple neon lights overhead

entered.detail: overhead covered walkway ceiling with bright purple neon tube lighting
yellow building facade with large digital signage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered walkway bathed in intense purple neon light from overhead tubes. The camera moves through this sheltered corridor with yellow building facades on the right, then exits back to the open street. The lighting shifts dramatically from purple artificial light back to the ambient neon of the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass beneath elevated highway with crosswalks

events.description: moving under the overpass into a more open intersection area with road signage
waiting at yellow crosswalk with other pedestrians as vehicles pass underneath the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and waiting at a yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the street

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving under the overpass through the intersection

entered.detail: large concrete overpass bridge with illuminated signage and structural supports
illuminated road sign indicating Berkeley Ave with directional arrows
yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway and moves under a large overpass structure. Road signs for Berkeley Ave are visible on the left. The scene opens into a wider intersection area with a yellow crosswalk where pedestrians wait for a futuristic vehicle to pass. Street-level shops line the area beneath the overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban corridor that transitions from an open sidewalk into a sheltered tunnel before emerging under a massive city overpass. It begins by walking along a sidewalk lined with towering digital billboards and sparse pedestrians, passing a red neon-lit vendor cart where a blue-haired figure browses the goods. As the camera moves further, it passes a purple vending machine and a parked luxury car before entering a covered walkway bathed in intense purple overhead light. The scene then shifts as the camera exits the purple corridor and moves beneath a heavy concrete overpass, passing Berkeley Ave road signs. Finally, the view opens into a wide intersection featuring street-level shops and a yellow crosswalk where pedestrians wait for a futuristic vehicle to pass.
